ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the player (e.g., batsman, bowler, all-rounder) */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Country of the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player */,
  "playing_hand" TEXT /* Playing hand of the player (right-hand or left-hand) */,
  "bowling_style" TEXT /* Bowling style of the player (right-arm, left-arm, spin, pace, etc.) */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the player's profile picture */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief biography of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "coach" TEXT /* Name of the team's coach */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the team's logo */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the team's official website */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* Links to the team's social media profiles */,
  "number_of_titles" INTEGER /* Number of titles won by the team */,
  "home_venue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team's home venue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_home_venue_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_venue_id") REFERENCES venues ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the match took place */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the match */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the match */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Venue of the match */,
  "team_1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first team */,
  "team_2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second team */,
  "match_type" TEXT /* Type of the match (e.g., T20, ODI, Test) */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the match (e.g., win, loss) */,
  "overs_bowled" INTEGER /* Total number of overs bowled in the match */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators */,
  "man_of_the_match" INTEGER /* Player ID of the man of the match */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the match */,
  "match_report_url" TEXT /* URL of the match report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team_2_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_2_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team_1_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_1_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stat record */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "balls" INTEGER /* Number of balls faced */,
  "runs" INTEGER /* Total runs scored */,
  "dot_balls" INTEGER /* Number of dot balls */,
  "other_runs" INTEGER /* Other runs scored (by means other than boundaries) */,
  "fours" INTEGER /* Number of fours hit */,
  "sixes" INTEGER /* Number of sixes hit */,
  "extras" INTEGER /* Number of extras conceded */,
  "wickets" INTEGER /* Number of wickets taken */,
  "strike_rate" REAL /* Strike rate (runs per 100 balls faced) */,
  "economy_rate" REAL /* Economy rate (runs conceded per over) */,
  "fifties" INTEGER /* Number of fifties scored */,
  "hundreds" INTEGER /* Number of hundreds scored */,
  "best_bowling" TEXT /* Best bowling figures in a single innings */,
  "Caught" INTEGER /* Number of catches taken */,
  "Stumped" INTEGER /* Number of stumpings */,
  "Run_outs" INTEGER /* Number of run-outs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venues" (
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each venue */,
  "venue_name" TEXT /* Name of the venue */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the venue */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Seating capacity of the venue */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the venue's image */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the venue's official website */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* Links to the venue's social media profiles */,
  "facility_details" TEXT /* Details about the venue's facilities */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Typical weather conditions at the venue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tournaments" (
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the tournament */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the tournament */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the tournament took place */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the tournament */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the tournament's logo */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the tournament's official website */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* Links to the tournament's social media profiles */,
  "number_of_teams" INTEGER /* Number of teams participating in the tournament */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the tournament */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the tournament */,
  "prize_money" TEXT /* Total prize money for the tournament */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "umpires" (
  "umpire_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each umpire */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the umpire */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the umpire */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the umpire */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the umpire */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the umpire's profile picture */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief biography of the umpire */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("umpire_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_umpires" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "umpire_id" INTEGER /* ID of the umpire */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id", "umpire_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_players" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id", "player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_tournaments" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id", "tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the performance trend */,
  "average_runs" REAL /* Average runs scored by the player in that year */,
  "average_wickets" REAL /* Average wickets taken by the player in that year */,
  "strike_rate" REAL /* Average strike rate (runs per 100 balls faced) */,
  "economy_rate" REAL /* Average economy rate (runs conceded per over) */,
  "fifties" INTEGER /* Number of fifties scored in that year */,
  "hundreds" INTEGER /* Number of hundreds scored in that year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_trends_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, coach) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (active, inactive, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action taken by the user (e.g., login, view report) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id")
)
